headlines.title: Zuckerberg warns ‘success isn’t a given’ after laying off 10% of Meta
headlines.description: As Meta cut 10% of its workforce on Wednesday, CEO Mark Zuckerberg addressed the tech giant’s transition in a companywide memo.

headlines.title: SpaceX confirms plans for an IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
headlines.description: SpaceX confirmed plans to sell shares of its stock to the public for the first time, according to a securities filing Wednesday outlining the company’s fundamentals

headlines.title: San Diego mosque suspects’ writings reveal influence of online extremism, experts say
headlines.description: The two teenage suspects in this week’s deadly attack on a San Diego mosque appear to have written a 75-page document replete with neo-Nazi ideology, incel rage and racist meme culture drawn from the darkest corners of the internet

headlines.title: Arizona college skips several graduates after an AI malfunction at commencement
headlines.description: The president of Glendale Community College in Arizona was met with loud booing by students last week after she admitted the artificial intelligence that was being used to read names skipped over some graduates at the commencement ceremony.

headlines.title: As Meta lays off 10%, 7,000 employees will be moved into AI roles, source says
headlines.description: Meta is moving 7,000 employees into roles focused on AI and consolidating them into four new organizations, according to a source familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: Jury throws out Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman in less than two hours
headlines.description: The jury ruled that Elon Musk had waited too long to sue OpenAI and its other co-founders.

headlines.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too
headlines.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

headlines.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'
headlines.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: SpaceX plans for a record-breaking IPO
headlines.description: SpaceX confirmed plans to sell shares of its stock to the public for the first time. NBC News' David Ingram has more on the developments.

headlines.title: Chaos consumes Swatch stores over pocket watch collaboration with Audemars Piguet
headlines.description: Swatch shut down over a dozen stores after crowds swarmed some locations trying to buy the company’s new pocket watch collection with Audemars Piguet, that are already listed for thousands on re-sale sites. NBC News’ Marquise Francis reports.

headlines.title: First look at new Trump Mobile smartphone
headlines.description: After a nine-month wait, repeated calls and emails, NBC News finally received the long-delayed Trump Mobile T1 phone - raising new questions about where it’s actually made. NBC News’ Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: Philadelphia high school fights misinformation crisis
headlines.description: A principal and nine students at Philadelphia's Kensington Health Sciences Academy have launched Project FACTS to help others learn how to think for themselves and question the legitimacy of the information they see online.
